children.name: p
children.textContent: Optimal windows for your planned outings

children.name: p
children.textContent: Clear skies, 62°F, light breeze at 7 mph. Perfect running conditions before city heats up.

children.name: span
children.textContent: If rain moves in early: Treadmill at Fitness SF, 0.3 mi from park entrance.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Sudden storm moving northeast. Lightning risk, heavy rain. Avoid open areas.

children.name: div
children.textContent: 18–23 mph gusts across waterfront corridor. Dangerous for cyclists on return leg.

children.name: div
children.textContent: All day · Market St / Civic Center

children.name: div
children.textContent: 4–6°F warmer than surrounding areas due to concrete density and low airflow.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-lightbulb" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15 14c.2-1 .7-1.7 1.5-2.5 1-.9 1.5-2.2 1.5-3.5A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 1 .2 2.2 1.5 3.5.7.7 1.3 1.5 1.5 2.5"/><path d="M9 18h6"/><path d="M10 22h4"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: Storm arrives 1:15 PM. Move your afternoon dog walk to 12:00–12:45 PM at the sheltered Dolores Park path — avoids both the waterfront wind and the incoming rain.
